title: NIT Srinagar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Project Fellow / Project Assistant posts
organization: National Institute of Technology Srinagar (NIT Srinagar)
short_info: National Institute of Technology Srinagar (NIT Srinagar) Junior Project Fellow / Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 15‑05‑2026 on the official website nitkashmir.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Srinagar Junior Project Fellow / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria and have a B.Tech in Civil Engineering or M.Tech in any specialization of Civil Engineering are eligible to apply for this post. The email application process for NIT Srinagar Junior Project Fellow / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 is o

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech in Civil Engineering, M.Tech in any Specializations of Civil Engineering
qualification.details: B.Tech in Civil Engineering, and M.Tech in any Specializations of Civil Engineering

salary_details.details: ₹ 30,000 Per Month (No HRA will be provided)

selection_process: Shortlisting based on desirable experience Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Srinagar Junior Project Fellow / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Srinagar Junior Project Fellow (JPF)/ Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 31st May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Tech in Civil Engineering and an M.Tech in any specialization of Civil Engineering to be eligible for these positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Project Fellow (JPF)/ Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of ₹ 30,000 per month. No House Rent Allowance (HRA) will be provided separately.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the NIT Srinagar Junior Project Fellow (JPF)/ Project Assistant positions?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with all required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Junior Project Fellow (JPF)/ Project Assistant in this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their desirable experience, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Junior Project Fellow (JPF)/ Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contract basis, meaning the employment is for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Technology Srinagar (NIT Srinagar).
